message:
test(session-resume): add 30 property-based tests for session_resume module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -313,6 +313,11 @@ name = "proptest_casr_types"
 path = "tests/proptest_casr_types.rs"
 required-features = ["session-resume"]
 
+[[test]]
+name = "proptest_session_resume"
+path = "tests/proptest_session_resume.rs"
+required-features = ["session-resume"]
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_disk_pressure"
 path = "tests/proptest_disk_pressure.rs"
@@ -421,6 +426,10 @@ redis-session = [
 ]
 # Feature gate for cross_agent_session_resumer integration (vendored IR types).
 session-resume = []
+# Feature gate for generic subprocess bridge foundation.
+subprocess-bridge = []
+# Feature gate for vibe_cockpit telemetry export bridge.
+vc-export = ["subprocess-bridge"]
 
 # Optional heavy integrations - feature-gated (internal)
 frankenterm-deps = ["dep:codec", "dep:config", "dep:mux", "dep:frankenterm-term"]
